allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("$env:TEMP\\nap-shot-mobile.png"\); "Mobile image size: $\($src.Width\) x $\($src.Height\)"; $cropW = 140; $crop = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($cropW, $src.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($crop\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,$cropW,$src.Height\)\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\($src.Width-$cropW,0,$cropW,$src.Height\)\), [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $crop.Save\("$env:TEMP\\nap-mobile-rightedge.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $crop.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); "Saved right-edge crop")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("$env:TEMP\\nap-shot-mobile.png"\); $cropW = 150; $sx = [int]$src.Width - [int]$cropW; $h = [int]$src.Height; $crop = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($cropW, $h\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($crop\); $destRect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle 0,0,$cropW,$h; $srcRect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle $sx,0,$cropW,$h; $g.DrawImage\($src, $destRect, $srcRect, [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $crop.Save\("$env:TEMP\\nap-mobile-rightedge.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $crop.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); "Saved crop: $cropW x $h from x=$sx")
